tool_args.label: Belt Parkway Food Inc. Withdrew Proposal
tool_args.raw_text: Belt Parkway Food Inc. submitted the strongest financial proposal, the retail units and Station infrastructure cannot support their proposed use, which requires venting for cooking and HVAC. Therefore, Belt Parkway Foods Inc. withdrew their proposal.

payload.claim_text: Belt Parkway Food Inc. submitted the strongest financial proposal, but the retail units and Station infrastructure cannot support their proposed use, which requires venting for cooking and HVAC. Therefore, Belt Parkway Foods Inc. withdrew their proposal.
